para.verbatim:
Detect NAT type using STUN server (async version).
Returns: NATType enum value

Detect NAT type using STUN server (sync wrapper).
Returns: NATType enum value

Connect to target device.
Args: target_did: Target device ID timeout: Connection timeout in seconds
Returns: Tuple of (error_code, mode_string)
Send data to connected peer (async version).
Send data to connected peer (sync wrapper).

Build STUN Binding Request.
Returns: Tuple of (request_bytes, transaction_id)

Parse STUN Binding Response, extract public address.
Args: data: Raw response bytes transaction_id: Expected transaction ID
Returns: Tuple of (ip, port) or None if parsing fails
P2P Client SDK with complete STUN support.
